changelog: Side menu navigation: Pressing LEFT from any home page (Discover, Continue Watching, Streaming Services, Genres, Decades, Sports, etc.) now ALWAYS lands focus on Home — never on Search or whichever rail item was last focused. Predictable, professional rail-entry every time.
Continue Watching: Pressing BACK during a movie or series asks "Are you done watching?" — Yes clears the title from your list, No saves your place. Live TV BACK behaviour unchanged.
Continue Watching: New "Clear All" tile at the end of the row + a "Clear All" link on the mobile hub. Confirmation dialog defaults to Cancel.
Continue Watching: Removing a title now syncs across every device on the same playlist (tombstone-based sync). 30-second propagation cycle.
Continue Watching: 14-day auto-prune drops anything you haven't touched in two weeks.
Continue Watching: The Home page lands on the Continue Watching tile automatically whenever you have something in progress, with the first card already focused.
